# Sponsor FaultRay

FaultRay is a research-prototype pre-deployment resilience simulation tool for infrastructure and AI agents. Your sponsorship directly funds development and keeps the project maintained.

## Sponsor Tiers

### Individual Supporter ($5/month)

Thank you for supporting FaultRay! As an Individual Supporter, you receive:

- Thank you badge
- Your name listed in the SPONSORS list

### Pro ($29/month)

For professionals who rely on FaultRay in their workflow:

- FaultRay Pro license key (50 components, unlimited simulations, compliance reports)
- Email support (24h SLA)

### Enterprise ($299/month)

For teams and organizations that need full capabilities:

- FaultRay Enterprise license key (unlimited components, SSO, insurance API, dedicated support 1h SLA)
- Contact for custom terms

### One-time Sponsor

Any amount is welcome. Every contribution helps fund development and keeps FaultRay moving forward.

---

**Enterprise customers:** contact [contact@faultray.com](mailto:contact@faultray.com) for custom licensing, SLA agreements, and on-premise deployment options.
